case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. COHEN/WONG DDS A PROFESSIONAL CORP.

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT COHEN/WONG DDS A PROFESSIONAL CORP. COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE
